name: Coconut Beer Batter Spam with Raspberry Horse
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces (1 can) Spam or Spam Lite
recipeInstructions:
1. Open the beer and leave it at room temperature overnight.
2. Chill the beer, then add water, oil, and eggs to a separate bowl. Mix just enough to break the egg yolks.
3. In another bowl, mix flour, salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the liquid mixture while stirring slowly.
5. Gradually add shredded coconut and continue stirring slowly.
6. Prepare the deep fryer according to the manufacturer's instructions. When the oil is hot enough, dip one-inch wide strips of Spam into the beer batter.
7. Deep fry until the Spam floats to the surface.
8. To make the raspberry sauce, combine raspberry syrup or jelly with horseradish sauce in a small bowl.
9. Dip the fried Spam into the raspberry sauce and enjoy.
